title: Val vs Var
description: Demonstrate the difference between read-only and reassignable variables in Kotlin.
problemStatement:
Kotlin encourages immutability. Declare a read-only variable `appName` with the value `"Progly"` and a reassignable variable `userCount` with `10`. Increase `userCount` to `11` and print both on separate lines.

**Requirement:** Use correctly chosen `val` and `var` keywords.
hints: Use `val` for constants and `var` for variables that change.
solutionCode:
fun main() {
    val appName = "Progly"
    var userCount = 10
    userCount++
    println(appName)
    println(userCount)
}
